message:
refactor: consolidate 7 duplicated neededNames blocks into queryReferencedColumns()

Extract shared helper in types.ts that computes the set of column names
referenced by a query descriptor (projections, filters, filterGroups,
sort, groupBy, aggregates, distinct, windows, join, subqueryIn,
vectorSearch). Replaces 7 copy-pasted 15-line blocks across
local-executor.ts, fragment-do.ts, and query-do.ts with 1-line calls.
Net -73 lines.
